---
title: "Exploratory Data Analysis"
subtitle: ""
date: last-modified
sidebar: auto
number-sections: false
toc: true
author:
  - Jumbong Junior 

categories: []
tags: [""]
title-block-banner: false
format: 
  html: 
    mainfont: Times New Roman
    fontsize: 1.1em

jupyter: python3

---

# Correlation Analysis

```{python}


import pandas as pd

import importlib
import src.data_analysis.correlations as utils

importlib.reload(utils)
from src.data_analysis.correlations import correlation_quanti_def_KW, cramers_v_with_target, correlation_matrix_quanti, cramers_v_matrix
from config import data_path, src_path, data_output_path

```

```{python}
# Impoort data from datasets
path_datasets = data_path
data_cleaning_output_path = data_output_path
```

```{python}
# Import data from datasets
train_imputed = pd.read_csv(f"{path_datasets}/train_imputed.csv")
```




```{python}
continuous_vars = [
    "person_income",
    "person_age",
    "person_emp_length",
    "loan_amnt",
    "loan_int_rate",
    "loan_percent_income",
    "cb_person_cred_hist_length"
]
target = "def"
result = correlation_quanti_def_KW(
    database=train_imputed,
    continuous_vars=continuous_vars,
    target=target
)

print(result)

# Save results to xlsx
result.to_excel(f"{data_output_path}/correlation/correlations_kw.xlsx", index=False)

```


```{python}

qualitative_vars = [
    "person_home_ownership",
    "cb_person_default_on_file",
    "loan_intent",
    "loan_grade",
]
result = cramers_v_with_target(
    database=train_imputed,
    categorical_vars=qualitative_vars,
    target=target
)

print(result)

# Save results to xlsx
result.to_excel(f"{data_output_path}/correlation/cramers_v.xlsx", index=False)
```


```{python}
corr = correlation_matrix_quanti(
    database=train_imputed,
    continuous_vars=continuous_vars,
    method="spearman"
)

print(corr)

# Save results to xlsx
corr.to_excel(f"{data_output_path}/correlation/correlation_matrix_spearman.xlsx")
```



```{python}
matrix = cramers_v_matrix(
    database=train_imputed,
    categorical_vars=qualitative_vars,
)

print(matrix)
# Save results to xlsx
matrix.to_excel(f"{data_output_path}/correlation/cramers_v_matrix.xlsx")
```
